errors.symptom: npm run lint --workspace=api failed immediately because ESLint 9 could not find an api-local eslint.config.* file.
errors.resolution: Add api/eslint.config.js so the workspace lint command can execute and act as a package-local validation gate.

errors.symptom: The iOS simulator build failed after `DayActivity` gained a custom decoder because previews and `DayDetailView` still instantiated `DayActivity(...)` directly.
errors.resolution: Add an explicit memberwise initializer alongside `init(from:)` whenever a Swift model still needs direct construction outside decoding.

errors.symptom: `xcodebuild -scheme GearSnitch` reported that the project had no such scheme even though the app target compiled successfully.
errors.resolution: When the repo does not include a checked-in shared `.xcscheme`, validate with a target-based simulator build and treat the missing scheme as project configuration debt rather than an application compile failure.
